summary.shape_sentence: Opened weak, flushed hard into late morning, then reversed in stages and finished with a late-day squeeze back to the upper end of the session.

goat.note: Late-session squeeze from the low-24,100s through stacked supply into the 24,450 area.

red_circles.behavior: Clustered in the late-morning sell program and on failed bounce attempts, marking lower highs and continuation shorts before the reversal.

green_circles.behavior: Appeared around the post-flush reversal and then stacked through the afternoon as higher lows formed and the squeeze matured.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply was layered around 24,200-24,320 and again around 24,360-24,450; early zones were respected, then broken one by one into the close.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand appeared near 24,160-24,200 and at 23,950-24,020; the lower shelf reversed the flush and higher shelves held the afternoon retests.

time_markers.10am_blue: Weak opening rotation with price already slipping below the open area and failing to stabilize.
time_markers.12pm_red: Price was in rebound mode off the flush low, trying to repair around the low-24,000s.
time_markers.2pm_green: Constructive higher-low state near 24,180-24,220, transitioning from repair to squeeze.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Bullish close near 24,398 after a sharp late push, finishing much nearer HOD than LOD.

takeaway: Bullish reversal day with a late-morning capitulation low, lunch-hour stabilization, and a strong afternoon squeeze reclaim into the close.
